summary: Solid TypeScript/Bun implementation with explicit types, clear error handling, and good modularity. Action refs not SHA-pinned (security gap: `actions/checkout@v4` should pin to full commit SHA). Dense regex patterns in parser.ts (lines 37-39, 55-62) lack comments. Markdown table generation repeats structure across lines 46-53. Otherwise well-architected: clean module separation, deterministic output, graceful error handling. Workflow structure is appropriate; assumes test files will be populated by test harness (reasonable design). Production-ready with SHA pinning added.
